shop_purchases.description: Pata kamisheni kutoka ununuzi wa bidhaa za kidijitali ndani ya mtandao wako.

ad_revenue.title: Mgawanyo wa Mapato ya Matangazo

ad_campaigns.title: Kampeni za Matangazo
ad_campaigns.description: Pata kamisheni kutoka kampeni za matangazo zinazonunuliwa na wanachama wa mtandao wako.

faq.title: Maswali yanayoulizwa mara kwa mara
faq.subtitle: Pata majibu ya maswali ya kawaida kuhusu MyHigh5
faq.answer_1: Unaweza kupata kipato kupitia zawadi za mashindano, kamisheni za ushirika, na manufaa ya uanachama wa mwanzilishi.
faq.answer_2: Unapata 10% kwa marejeo ya moja kwa moja (kiwango cha 1) na 1% kwa viwango vya 2-10 kwa shughuli zinazostahili.
faq.answer_3: Ni uanachama wa muda maalum wenye manufaa ya ziada ya mgawanyo wa mapato na faida.
faq.answer_4: Fungua akaunti ya bure, kamilisha wasifu wako, kisha tuma maudhui kulingana na masharti ya shindano.
faq.answer_5: Ndiyo. Mashindano mengi ni ya bure, ingawa hatua za uthibitisho zinaweza kuwa na gharama.
faq.answer_6: Tumia pochi yako kwenye dashibodi na fuata njia za utoaji zilizopo.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Financial overview, journal entries, and reports
accounting.journal_desc_paged: Posted entries, newest first. Use Load more for older history.
accounting.no_coa: No accounts in the database. Run chart-of-accounts initialization on the server.
accounting.reports_hint: Generate balance sheet, income statement, trial balance, USDT (BSC) treasury summary, or account activity.
accounting.full_pack_hint: Full pack runs consistency checks and includes balance sheet, income statement, trial balance, USDT (BSC) treasury summary, and ledger summaries.
accounting.operations_desc: Check ledger integrity, sync the chart of accounts from the server, backfill missing payment journals, and correct founding-member accruals. Existing journals keep the same account IDs when codes are renamed.
accounting.founding_pool_backfill_hint: Use when deposits already have journals but account 2104 is missing. Run a dry run first.
